visual_description: A close-up, low-angle shot focuses on a dark wooden table in a dimly lit room. Several old-fashioned, silver flip phones are scattered across the surface. In the background, the out-of-focus figures of people stand on either side of the table. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera is static, creating a tense and focused atmosphere. The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic, and slightly percussive instrumental track that creates a suspenseful and serious mood. The camera pans up slightly and shifts focus to a group of men standing in a tight space. The central figure is an older man with short, graying hair, wearing a light gray suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt. He is handed a brown envelope by someone off-screen. To his left, a younger man in a black shirt and a silver necklace looks on. The background is dark and indistinct, with cool, greenish lighting casting shadows.
